name: sandcastle-max
description: AFK Claude Code agents en Docker contra tu Claude Max subscription (vía CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN, workaround para Sandcastle issue #191 wontfix). v0.8.0: bootstrap del schema cache standalone vía /sandcastle-probe-resources (host-only, no containers) — cachea schemas a .sandcastle/probes/<name>.schema que engineering-workflow >=2.3.0 lee desde /to-issues y /agent-brief para anchor briefs a refs reales (verifica table.column, endpoint, topic, key). /sandcastle-init final checklist pide correrlo después del scaffold. v0.7.0 sigue vigente: .sandcastle/resources.json declara recursos externos (DB/HTTP/queue/etc) con policy mandatory|optional; 3 niveles de defensa (Level 1 host pre-flight, Level 2 container connectivity, Level 3 container schema diff); runtime/main.mts propaga env_required al agentEnv; prompt enforza red-green-reality-first. Slash commands: /sandcastle-init, /sandcastle-probe-resources (NUEVO v0.8.0), /sandcastle-build, /sandcastle-run, /sandcastle-dispatch-wave, /sandcastle-merge-wave, /sandcastle-pipeline. Per-project image: sandcastle-<repo-basename>.
